prompt: Read Phase 3 synthesis for TRAPPIST-1 e and produce a Firefly ATMOFX_BODY cfg.

assertions.text: Color block has all 9 keys: glow, glow_hot, trail_primary, trail_secondary, trail_tertiary, trail_streak, wrap_layer, wrap_streak, shockwave
Every color value is exactly 4 space-separated tokens (R G B intensity)
trail_primary R > B (warm tone, consistent with N2+O2 Earth-like reentry palette)
shockwave B > R (cool blue-violet tone, consistent with air plasma physics)
No '1.0f' / '0.5f' style float literals (KSP cfg uses bare floats)
No commas in color values (space-separated only)
Body name has no spaces, dashes, or special chars
